 # NovaMind AI — Strategy & Memory
 
-## Current State (Week 20, Day 140)
-- **Cash: $21,529 — CRITICAL (11 days runway at current burn)**
-- Subscribers: 5,041 (S1: 4,611, S2: 372, S3: 40, D_S10: 13, D_S07: 2, D_S04: 3)
-- W20 net burn: -$14,434 (-$2,062/day) — TERRIBLE, 3.6× worse than projected
-- Issues: 686 open (S1: 643, S2: 38, S3: 3)
-- No R&D in progress. No enterprise activity.
+## Current State (Week 22, Day 147)
+- **Cash: $10,616 — EXTREME EMERGENCY (~7-12 days runway)**
+- Subscribers: 4,956 (S1: 4,510, S2: 387, S3: 41, D_S10: 13, D_S04: 3, D_S07: 2)
+- W21 burn: -$1,559/day — way worse than projected
+- Issues: 1,068 open (S1: 1,014, S2: 49, S3: 2)
+- **S1: 139 Plan A cancellations** — $18→$20 price hike damage
+- **S3: 113 leads, 1 conversion (0.9%)** — still broken despite 40% lead promo
+- Competitor events: ~8 quality bumps (0.012-0.026) in W21 alone
 
-## S3 DISASTER — 0/80 CONVERSIONS
-- **80 S3 leads arrived in W20, ZERO converted. All lost.**
-- Recovery from W18-19 has collapsed completely.
-- 1,837 S3 leads lost lifetime vs only 40 active subs.
-- Root cause: competitor events pushing quality expectations beyond Plan A's delivered quality
-- Multiple competitor posts this week citing 0.01-0.014 quality bumps
+## Changes Made Week 22 (SURVIVAL MODE)
+- **OPS**: $1,179→$600/day ($250 base + $350 targeted: S1=$200, S2=$75, S3=$75)
+- **DEV**: $800→$450/day ($100 base + $350 targeted: S1=$50, S2=$50, S3=$250)
+- **ADS**: $371→$100/day (search_ads + social_media, S2+S3 only)
+- **S3 lead promo**: 40%→25%, ongoing promo: 20%
+- **S1 price**: kept at $20 (no yo-yo)
+- **Projected burn**: ~$700-900/day → ~12-15 days runway
 
-## Changes Made Week 21
-- **S1 PRICE HIKE**: Plan A $18→$20 (+$307/day revenue)
-- **OPS CUT**: $1,250→$1,000/day (enough to manage issues)
-- **DEV REBALANCE**: $700/day, shifted $500/day to S3 (5× targeted coefficient)
-- **ADS CUT**: $500→$300/day, focused on S2+S3
-- **LEAD PROMOS**: S1=0%, S2=7%, S3=40%
-- **ONGOING S3 PROMO**: 20% to prevent churn at billing
-- **Projected burn**: ~$1,172/day → 18 days runway
-
-## Strategy — SURVIVE THEN RECOVER
-1. **Cash preservation** — cut all non-essential spending
-2. **S3 rescue via dev** — $500/day targeted dev builds cumulative quality bonus
-3. **S1 milking** — $20 Plan A, no promos, minimal dev
-4. **Watch for S1 churn** — price increase risk on next billing cycle
-5. **No R&D** — can't afford it
-6. **No market research** — can't afford it
+## Strategy — PURE SURVIVAL
+1. **Cash preservation above all** — every dollar counts
+2. **S3 dev $250/day** — cumulative quality bonus is our only growth hope
+3. **S1 milking** — $20 price, minimal spend, accept churn
+4. **No R&D, no market research** — can't afford
+5. **Pray S3 quality gap closes** before we run out of money
 
 ## Key Metrics to Watch
-- S3 conversion rate — ANY conversions are a win
-- S1 churn from $18→$20 price increase
-- Cash — approaching danger zone
-- Issue backlog — 643 S1 issues need resolution
+- **CASH** — primary concern. If burn > $1,000/day we die in <2 weeks
+- S3 conversion rate — ANY improvement is critical
+- S1 churn — more billing cycles will hit; how many stay at $20?
+- Issue backlog — 1,014 S1 issues will fester with low ops
 
 ## Lessons Learned
-- **S3 leads arrive in volume but quality gap blocks conversion** — need to close gap via dev spending or R&D
-- **Competitor events compound** — multiple per week add up fast
-- **next-week takes 13 args**: rationale string + 12 cash forecast numbers (1wk pt/lo/hi, 4wk, 12wk, 26wk)
-- **No separate log_rationale tool** — rationale is passed to next-week
+- **S1 price hike ($18→$20) caused 139 cancellations in one week** — S1 is very price-sensitive
+- **S3 conversion remains near-zero** — 40% lead promo doesn't help if quality gap exists
+- **Competitor events are relentless** — 8 in one week, ~0.12+ cumulative quality expectation increase
+- **next-week takes 13 args**: rationale string + 12 cash forecast numbers (1wk pt/lo/hi, 4wk, 12wk, 26wk) — all in dollars
 - **subscriptions.status values**: 'lead', 'subscribed', 'cancelled', 'lost'
-- **social_media_posts result is dict with 'posts' key**
-- **get_group_insights returns nested structure**: estimates, network_influence, reputation_influence
-- **Issues table**: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
-- **S3 rescue failed in W20** — 40% lead promo alone isn't enough; need quality improvement
+- **Dashboard "Daily Spend" shows base only** — targeted spend (ops/dev/ads) is additional
 - **Per-group dev coefficient is 5× global** (0.0225 vs 0.0045 in ln formula)
-- **Capacity T2 = 800K units/day at $530/day**
-- **Compute costs**: T2 model=$0.002/unit, T3=$0.006, T5=$0.03
-- **R&D tiers are independent and repeatable** — Tier 2 costs $333K (can't afford)
\ No newline at end of file
+- **q_min in estimates is quality floor** — minimum acceptable quality at any price
+- **Config overrides table**: day, tool_name, setting_type, settings_json
+- **S1 quality delivered (0.3869) >> q_min (0.081)** — churn is price-driven, not quality-driven
+- **S3 quality delivered (0.3705) >> q_min (0.145)** — conversion failure is baffling; may be WTP/price curve issue
\ No newline at end of file
